title: Minimum information for Audit Committee on Related Party Transactions
obligation_summary: Provide detailed information to Audit Committee/shareholders before approving related party transactions, including relationship, value, tenure and justification.
penalty_impact: Potential violation of LODR; enforcement under SEBI Act.

title: Cybersecurity and Cyber Resilience for SEBI Regulated Entities
obligation_summary: Implement cyber audit, continuous monitoring, incident reporting and annual Board review for cybersecurity framework.
penalty_impact: Regulatory action for non-compliance with framework.

title: Measures for risk management in equity derivatives
obligation_summary: Monitor client and member positions, manage concentration, enhance margining and stress testing for index derivatives.
penalty_impact: Risk of enforcement for inadequate risk controls.

title: Special window for physical share transfer deeds
obligation_summary: Open special window to process delayed physical transfer deeds subject to KYC and verification.
key_obligation: Process transfer deeds within special window

title: IFSCA (Fund Management) Regulations – FME registration
obligation_summary: Fund Management Entities in IFSC must meet net worth, eligibility, governance and reporting requirements to be registered.
penalty_impact: Suspension or cancellation of FME registration.

title: Circular on certification course for FME KMPs
obligation_summary: Key managerial personnel of FMEs must complete specified certification courses within defined timelines.

title: Stewardship Code framework in IFSC
obligation_summary: FMEs must adopt stewardship responsibilities, including voting, engagement and conflict management for investee entities.
penalty_impact: Regulatory censure or conditions on registration.

title: KYC Master Directions – risk-based KYC updates
obligation_summary: Banks and NBFCs must categorise customers by risk, perform periodic KYC review and upload standardised KYC data.
deadline_frequency: High risk: frequent; low risk: longer cycles
penalty_impact: AML/CFT breaches; monetary penalty, supervisory action.

title: Digital lending – explicit consent for data sharing
obligation_summary: Digital lenders must obtain explicit customer consent for data sharing with credit bureaus and third parties.
key_obligation: Explicit customer consent for data use
deadline_frequency: At onboarding and before each new use
penalty_impact: License restrictions or cancellation in severe cases.

title: KYC provisions – removal of OTP-based lending cap
obligation_summary: Institution-specific KYC directions remove prior universal cap on OTP-based e-KYC loans, replacing with risk-based safeguards.
key_obligation: Align lending policies with new KYC directions
